name: luxe-en-vogue-checkout
description: Requires PAYSTACK_SECRET_KEY (and optionally PUBLIC_BASE_URL) to be set as environment variables in the Vercel project settings. See /api/create-checkout-session.js for details. Order storage uses Vercel KV (Upstash Redis) — see /api/verify-order.js for the required KV_REST_API_URL / KV_REST_API_TOKEN env vars, which Vercel sets automatically once a KV store is attached to the project (Storage tab -> Create Database -> KV, then Connect Project). ADMIN_SECRET is optional and only needed if you add the admin status-update endpoint.
